ticket.subject: Currency Settings
ticket.description: Can I set your plugin to convert the shipping fee to my store currency using a fixed rate before it displays to the customers? Currently, the shipping fee is not working well with the YayCurrency switcher that I am using.

comments.body: Can I set your plugin to convert the shipping fee to my store currency using a fixed rate before it displays to the customers? Currently, the shipping fee is not working well with the YayCurrency switcher that I am using.
comments.html_body: Can I set your plugin to convert the shipping fee to my store currency using a fixed rate before it displays to the customers? Currently, the shipping fee is not working well with the YayCurrency switcher that I am using.
comments.plain_body: Can I set your plugin to convert the shipping fee to my store currency using a fixed rate before it displays to the customers? Currently, the shipping fee is not working well with the YayCurrency switcher that I am using.

comments.body:
Hello Somto,

Hope you are doing well!

We do have compatibility with Aelia Multi-currency Switcher & WooCommerce Currency Switcher (official) solutions.

Regarding YayCurrency swithers: As of now, I have not tested the working of our plugin alongside the YayCommerce (https://yaycommerce.com/yaycurrency-woocommerce-multi-currency-switcher/ ) plugin that you are using. so we cannot guarantee compatibility.

We recommend trying the WooCOmmerce Currency Switcher (official) solution and verifying how it goes.

Do let us know if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Somto,
 
Hope you are doing well!
 
We do have compatibility with Aelia Multi-currency Switcher & WooCommerce Currency Switcher (official) solutions. 
 
Regarding YayCurrency swithers: As of now, I have not tested the working of our plugin alongside the YayCommerce (https://yaycommerce.com/yaycurrency-woocommerce-multi-currency-switcher/ ) plugin that you are using. so we cannot guarantee compatibility.
 
We recommend trying the WooCOmmerce Currency Switcher (official) solution and verifying how it goes. 
 
Do let us know if you need any assistance.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

Request #310143 "URL" was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #310143:

Hi,

Is it possible to change the ending of my store URL? Right now, it appears as https://somtico.com/dashboard/pluginhive/. Can I customize it to end differently instead of "pluginhive"?

Thank you!

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
